name: Walnut Chicken with Raspberry-Lime Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, mix the walnuts, garlic powder, salt, and pepper well.
2. In a second shallow dish, place the beaten egg. Dip each chicken piece one at a time first in the beaten egg, then in the walnut mixture, turning to coat.
3. In a saute pan, add two tablespoons of oil and heat over medium flame. Add the chicken and cook, turning occasionally, about 10 minutes or until the chicken is brown on all sides and fork tender. Remove the chicken and set aside, keeping it warm.
4. To the same saute pan, add the remaining tablespoon of oil, any remaining walnut mixture, and onion. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Add sherry, raspberry jam, lime juice, and coriander to the pan. Heat until boiling, then cook, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes or until thickened.
6. Spoon the sauce over the chicken.
